official_body: Jobs in Malta / Konnekt (primary); ERI (secondary comparator)
source_title: Beautician listing in Malta with posted annual salary; triangulated with ERI Malta beautician salary benchmark
text_value: Primary observed job-posted salary: EUR 30,000/year. Secondary comparator: ERI average EUR 18,291/year; range EUR 13,572-21,620.
notes: Primary source selected for market recency and explicit Malta salary posting. Secondary ERI comparator retained for triangulation. Role adjacency is beautician / beauty therapist rather than full spa therapist benchmark.
benchmark_band_note: Observed market anchor currently sits above wage floor; primary live posting at EUR 30,000/year with lower secondary comparator from ERI.
benchmark_use_case: Use as draft upper-market compensation anchor above legal wage floor.
comparator_note: Primary = live job posting; secondary = salary database.
fit_for_modeling_note: Draft-ready benchmark for calibration; not final until more Malta spa-therapist-specific evidence is captured.
